llm_reasoning: Suitability is poor due to multiple critical limiting factors. The strongest positive is the zero frost risk. However, the mean temperature (14.58°C) is significantly below tobacco's optimal range (20-30°C). Rainfall (246.74mm) is extremely insufficient, requiring extensive irrigation.
